name: Southwestern Corn Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Shredded Cojack or Monterey Jack cheese
1/2 cup Chopped red or green sweet pepper
1 tbsp Snipped fresh cilantro or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Place corn bread in a 15 X 10 X 1 inch baking pan.
2. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30 minutes or until toasted, stirring every 10 minutes. Remove corn bread from the oven and cool.
3. In a large bowl combine corn, drained chili peppers, olives, cheese, onion, sweet pepper, cilantro or parsley, and egg. Mix well.
4. Add cornbread; toss gently to mix.
5. Use to stuff an 8 - 10 pound turkey. Or, bake, covered, in an ungreased 2-quart casserole in a 325 degree oven for 50 to 60 minutes or until heated through.
